diagnoses.what_google_means: Google found these URLs (via sitemap or links) but chose not to crawl/index them yet. This is Google's quality/crawl budget decision.
diagnoses.explanation: Do NOT click Validate Fix. These pages need CONTENT IMPROVEMENT first. 9 important pages affected (T1/T2 calculators, guides). Google is deprioritizing these due to thin content or low authority.

diagnoses.what_google_means: Google has not discovered these URLs at all — not in sitemap processing, not via internal links, not via backlinks.
diagnoses.explanation: Check if these URLs are in the sitemap. If yes, resubmit sitemap. If no, add them. Also add internal links from indexed pages to these URLs. 3 important pages affected.

diagnoses.what_google_means: Pages successfully crawled and indexed by Google
diagnoses.explanation: These pages are working correctly. No action needed for indexing. Focus on ranking improvement.

diagnoses.issue_group: Duplicate, Google chose different canonical than user
diagnoses.what_google_means: Google found a different canonical URL for this page than what the page declares.
diagnoses.explanation: Minor canonical issue affecting 2 pages. Expected for some URL variants. Review self-referencing canonicals on these pages.

diagnoses.issue_group: Alternate page with proper canonical tag
diagnoses.what_google_means: Google found a different canonical URL for this page than what the page declares.
diagnoses.explanation: Minor canonical issue affecting 2 pages. Expected for some URL variants. Review self-referencing canonicals on these pages.
